specific_mechanism: BURNSIDE-AUG: orbit-equivalent data augmentation budget allocator
llm_application: Use Burnside's lemma to count distinct orbits under a token-permutation symmetry group; allocate data-augmentation budget inversely proportional to orbit size to balance training exposure.
novelty_claim: Distinct from R695 Pólya enumeration feedback (which counts orbits but doesn't drive augmentation allocation).
sub_mechanisms: M_3 invert orbit size for budget
